input.contents:
"""DevPod SSH provider bootstrap for container startup."""

from .cli import BootstrapError
from .ssh_bootstrap import bootstrap_ssh_provider
from .ssh_settings import (
    DevpodSshProviderSettings,
    is_ssh_provider_activated,
    load_ssh_provider_settings,
)

__all__ = [
    "BootstrapError",
    "DevpodSshProviderSettings",
    "bootstrap_ssh_provider",
    "is_ssh_provider_activated",
    "load_ssh_provider_settings",
]

        python -m agentos_platform.devpod.ssh_bootstrap || exit $?

input.new_string: # Optional DevPod SSH provider (name fixed to "remote-docker"; bootstrap does not set as default)

input.contents:
services:
  agentos-api:
    # Dev overrides: hot reload + file sync
    ports: !override
      - "9900:9900"
    volumes: !override
      - shell_workdir:/home/ubuntu/workdir
    environment:
      - RUNTIME_ENV=dev
      - AGENTOS_SERVER_MODE=dev
      - UVICORN_PORT=9900
      - AGENTOS_URL=${AGENTOS_URL:-http://127.0..1:9900}
      - PRINT_ENV_ON_LOAD=False
    develop:
      watch:
        # Sync source changes into container for uvicorn reload.
        - action: sync
          path: .
          target: /app
          ignore:
            - .git/
            - .venv/
            - .mypy_cache/
            - .ruff_cache/
            - __pycache__/
            - .pytest_cache/
            - .cursor/
            - .env
            - workdir/
            - agentos_docker.egg-info/
            - "*.pyc"
        # Dependency or image changes require a rebuild.
        - action: rebuild
          path: pyproject.toml
        - action: rebuild
          path: uv.lock
        - action: rebuild
          path: Dockerfile

input.old_string:
# Optional: DevPod AWS provider bootstrap (provider name "rebase"; all DEVPOD_AWS_* below required when DEVPOD_AWS_VPC_ID is set).
# Production: host ~/.aws is bind-mounted read-only at /home/app/.aws (chmod 644 so uid 61000 can read).
# Dev (compose.dev.yaml): bind mounts are often empty in devcontainer/DinD — copy credentials instead:
#   mkdir -p .aws-local && cp ~/.aws/credentials .aws-local/ && chmod 644 .aws-local/credentials
#   [ -f ~/.aws/config ] && cp ~/.aws/config .aws-local/ && chmod 644 .aws-local/config
# compose watch syncs .aws-local/ into the container; AWS_SHARED_CREDENTIALS_FILE points there.
#
# Dev edits: change files in the repo on the host (compose watch syncs into /app).
# Writable scratch inside the container: SHELL_TOOLS_WORKDIR (/home/ubuntu/workdir).
# Do not rely on editing /app only via docker exec — rebuild or restart after image changes.
#
# Optional DevPod SSH provider (name "remote-docker"; remote host with Docker).
input.new_string: # Optional DevPod SSH provider (name "remote-docker"; remote host with Docker).

input.contents:
# Evidence: DevPod SSH provider bootstrap

| Artifact | Meaning |
| --- | --- |
| `health.json` | API serves HTTP 200 with `status: ok` when SSH bootstrap is not activated |
| `config.json`, `agents.json` | AgentOS registration unchanged; no new agents from bootstrap |
| `startup-excerpt.log` | Container reached uvicorn without bootstrap errors |

When `DEVPOD_SSH_HOST`, `DEVPOD_SSH_USER`, and key material are unset, SSH bootstrap is a no-op and the API starts normally. When set, entrypoint runs `python -m agentos_platform.devpod.ssh_bootstrap` before `exec uvicorn`.

content.text:
Implemented [issue #138](https://github.com/trilogy-group/ab-agno/issues/138) per the [approved design](https://github.com/trilogy-group/ab-agno/blob/architecture-design/issue-138/.rebaseai/arch-design/issue-138/design.md). Summary:

### Removed (EC2/AWS DevPod path)
- `bootstrap.py`, `settings.py`, `__main__.py`
- AWS tests: `test_devpod_bootstrap.py`, `test_devpod_settings.py`
- Docs: `docs/design/devpod-bootstrap.md`, `DESIGN_devpod_bootstrap.md`
- Compose: `~/.aws` volume mount and all `AWS_*` / `DEVPOD_AWS_*` / related env passthrough
- `example.env` AWS bootstrap section
- Entrypoint line: `python -m agentos_platform.devpod.bootstrap`
- `AWS_PROVIDER_NAME` from `names.py`

### Preserved (SSH DevPod path)
- New `devpod/cli.py` with `BootstrapError`, `CliRunResult`, and `run_step()` (lifted from deleted `bootstrap.py`)
- `ssh_bootstrap.py`, `ssh_settings.py`, `use_ssh_provider.py` rewired to `devpod.cli`
- `__init__.py` now exposes only the SSH surface (no lazy `__getattr__`)
- `test_ssh_provider_bootstrap.py` kept and updated

### Other updates
- `compose.dev.yaml`: dropped `.aws-local` sync and `AWS_*` env overrides
- `evidence/README.md`: documents SSH-only bootstrap
- Removed stray `mkdir` artifact and untracked `scripts/setup-aws-local.sh` / `.aws-local.example/` (not in git)

### Validation
`./scripts/validate.sh` passed (318 unit tests).

Changes are on branch `coder/issue-131`. Say if you want a dedicated `coder/issue-138` branch and/or a commit. After pulling these changes, recreate the API container so the entrypoint no longer references the removed AWS bootstrap module.

[REDACTED]

<user_query>

</user_query>

input.old_string:
# Optional: DevPod provider bootstrap (all DEVPOD_AWS_* and paths below required when DEVPOD_PROVIDER is set).
# Host ~/.aws is mounted read-only at /home/app/.aws. On EC2 use profile agentos-ec2 (config-only, IMDS).
# See example.env for ~/.aws/config layout (credential_source = Ec2InstanceMetadata).
AWS_PROFILE=agentos-ec2
AWS_REGION=us-east-1
DEVPOD_AWS_PROFILE=agentos-ec2
DEVPOD_AWS_REGION=us-east-1
DEVPOD_AWS_AMI=ami-00403f401ee6a4b98
DEVPOD_AWS_ROOT_DEVICE=/dev/sda1
DEVPOD_AWS_SUBNET_ID=subnet-0601ad2c2d076156c
DEVPOD_AWS_VPC_ID=vpc-0955542af6add2973
DEVPOD_AWS_INSTANCE_TYPE=t3.2xlarge
DEVPOD_AWS_DISK_SIZE=200
DEVPOD_AGENT_PATH=/var/lib/toolbox/devpod
DEVPOD_INACTIVITY_TIMEOUT=30m
DEVPOD_AWS_PROVIDER_SOURCE=loft-sh/devpod-provider-aws
DEVPOD_AWS_USE_INSTANCE_CONNECT_ENDPOINT=false
DEVPOD_AWS_USE_ROUTE53=false
DEVPOD_AWS_USE_SESSION_MANAGER=false
DEVPOD_AWS_USE_SPOT_INSTANCE=false
DEVPOD_INJECT_DOCKER_CREDENTIALS=true
DEVPOD_INJECT_GIT_CREDENTIALS=true
DEVPOD_CUSTOM_AWS_CREDENTIAL_COMMAND=
DEVPOD_SSH_HOST=34.207.213.21
input.new_string:
# Optional DevPod SSH provider (see example.env).
DEVPOD_SSH_HOST=34.207.213.21

content.text:
Removed from `.env`:

- `AWS_PROFILE` / `AWS_REGION`
- All `DEVPOD_AWS_*` variables
- `DEVPOD_AGENT_PATH`, `DEVPOD_INACTIVITY_TIMEOUT`
- `DEVPOD_INJECT_*` and `DEVPOD_CUSTOM_AWS_CREDENTIAL_COMMAND`
- The old EC2/AWS bootstrap comments

Left in place: `DEVPOD_SSH_*`, devpod timeout settings, and the rest of your config. Restart the API container if it’s already running so it picks up the trimmed env.

[REDACTED]

content.text:
### Validation
`./scripts/validate.sh` passed (324 unit tests, ruff, mypy).

### Commit & push
Committed staged issue-138 work only:

**`8c35b59`** — `refactor(devpod): remove EC2/AWS provider bootstrap (#138)`

Pushed to `coder/issue-131` → [PR #135](https://github.com/trilogy-group/ab-agno/pull/135)

### Babysit ([PR #135](https://github.com/trilogy-group/ab-agno/pull/135))
| Check | Status |
|--------|--------|
| lint, type, test-unit | Success |
| conventional-pr-title | Success |
| Semgrep | Success |
| Merge state | **CLEAN** / **MERGEABLE** |

Greptile’s open comments (`admin_scope`, env-configurable audience, duplicate test helper) target older commits. The branch already has `admin_scope` defaulting to `agent_os:admin` with `SUPABASE_JWT_ADMIN_SCOPE` (`ac64cbb` and later). No further code changes needed for CI.

### Note
You still have **uncommitted local work** (auth/JWT PEM support in `app/auth.py`, `src/agno_platform/settings.py`, `compose.yaml`, `example.env`, `tests/unit/test_auth_settings.py`). That was intentionally left out of this commit. Say if you want that committed on the same branch or a separate one.

`.env` was cleaned earlier and stays gitignored (not in the commit).

[REDACTED]

content.text:
### Validation
`./scripts/validate.sh` passed (324 tests, ruff, mypy).

### Commit & push
**`4bcf609`** — `feat(auth): support Agno PEM JWT verification keys alongside Supabase`

Files:
- `src/agno_platform/settings.py` — `JWT_VERIFICATION_KEY(S)` / file loading
- `app/auth.py` — PEM + Supabase JWKS/secret paths in `build_authorization_config`
- `compose.yaml`, `example.env` — new env passthrough/docs
- `tests/unit/test_auth_settings.py` — coverage for PEM-only and combined paths

### Babysit ([PR #135](https://github.com/trilogy-group/ab-agno/pull/135))
| Check | Status |
|--------|--------|
| lint, type, test-unit | Success |
| conventional-pr-title | Success |
| Semgrep | Success |
| Merge state | **CLEAN** / **MERGEABLE** |

PR is green and ready to merge. Greptile’s earlier `admin_scope` / duplicate-helper notes are addressed on this branch (configurable scope, no duplicated baseline helper).

[REDACTED]
